criteria.criterion: outbound_differ.py, inbound_differ.py, apply_inbound.py have NO module-level import of the vendor MAPPER entrypoint (_map_local_to_jira_fields / _map_jira_to_local_fields); they receive it via Backend-port injection — verified by the AST assertions in tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/test_backend_neutrality.py.
The injected mapper is actually USED by each differ (not bypassed) — verified by positive injection tests in the neutrality gate (a passed-in fake mapper is exercised).
outbound_links._RELATION_TO_JIRA_LINK is single-sourced in adapters/jira/ (jira_fields.py) and imported from there.
Behaviour-preserving: full reconcile unit+integration suite green; whole test tree still collects cleanly.

citation.description: Ticket comment by Joe Oakhart attests Gerrit change 914 MERGED to main; CI ran full gate (make lint, make typecheck, pytest matrix on py3.11/3.12/3.13+macos) and passed. All injected code paths are concrete (no stubs/skips). The codebase shows all required structures in place.
